peer_exemplars.reasoning: The person's very high authoritarianism (85.88) and low openness (40.96) align with the sacred value activation channel, but their high agreeableness (82.39) and moderate political trust (57.92) limit movement; the operation's fatigue mechanism produces a small 14-point reduction from 211 toward -1000.

High openness and extraversion, combined with strong GAL-TAN and cosmopolitan values, provide resistance to the operation's subtle erosion of democracy-promotion support, but the sustained tracking and digital-signage distortion targeting her identity-foreclosure and fearful-avoidant attachment produce a small update downward.

The operation's grievance-landscape mapping and leak archive targeting first-gen diaspora vulnerabilities, combined with this person's very low agreeableness, low openness, high authoritarian submission, and strong dangerous-worldview, make them resistant to further reducing already low democracy-promotion support, as the supply-interruption narrative reinforces their existing skepticism without moving them further.

The operation's AI-agentic architecture and developer account pressure exploit this person's high trust in institutions and low openness to erode support for democracy promotion, but their strong moral foundations of care and fairness limit the movement to a small update.

The operation's interdependent self-construal framing and NFT-based community capture do not engage this profile's already strong opposition to democracy promotion (baseline -312), and her very low agreeableness and high libertarianism make her resistant to external influence on this item.
